title: Hoshi no Shima no Nyanko
synopsis: The story centers on the cats Hopi, Toto, and Mao, who set out on the ocean in search of a place to establish a new town. The three friends plan to find the mysterious "Island of Stars." When they happen to chance upon it, they immediately get to work developing the island, but encounter many difficulties in their task. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Animals
tags.description: Prominently features animal characters in a leading role.

title: Shanshen Yu Xiaozao
synopsis: Xiaozao is a girl who always brings misfortune to others. She has to move into a temple named God of Mountains Temple where lives a real god of mountains. Xiaozao met the god when she was a young girl and it seems it’s the god who cursed her. But, later on, they fall in love with each other! And their love story began much earlier than they thought? (Source: Mangatoon, edited)

tags.name: Youkai
tags.description: Prominently features supernatural creatures from Japanese folklore.

tags.name: Gods

tags.name: Kids
tags.description: Target demographic is young children.

title: KINO
synonyms: Kino Tokyo no Ki to Yama no wo Hanashi
synopsis: A Kino Tokyo Tree Products information video and mission statement hosted on their official youtube channel. After WW2 many trees were taken from Tokyo's mountains to rebuild towns. New trees were replanted densely but in the 70 years it takes time for them to mature, foreign markets have brought imported trees to Japan. Now Tokyo's mountains are suffering due to unused mature lumber far too dense to support the original ecosystem of the mountains. Kino Tokyo Tree Products offers woods products, gifts, and crafts that embody traditional Japanese culture as well as responsible harvesting of the Tokyo mountain lumber.

tags.name: Environmental
tags.description: Concern with the state of the natural world and how humans interact with it.

tags.name: Historical

title: Dededen
synopsis: The studio TMS Entertainment collaborated with Seibu Railways on the new original anime Dededen. The anime celebrates both the 50th anniversary of TMS Entertainment and the 100th anniversary of Seibu Railways. TMS Entertainment happens to be located near the Araiyakushimae Station on the Seibu Shinjuku Line. The anime followed the daily life of the main lead Amoru Tokorozawa and the railway. TMS plans to make five episodes, each 75 seconds long. It is running on the train's onboard SmileVision screens, as well as on the Smile StationVision screens around major stations from February 23 to December 31. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Marumofubiyori
synopsis: Marumofubiyori is a Sanrio universe line introduced in Tokyo's Shinjuku Ward on February 6, 2017. Now with an anime adaptation we see a white bear in a blanket known as Mop and his friends. (Source: Sanrio Wiki)

title: Peeping Life Specials
synopsis: First special is a music video for the opening song. Second special is a bonus episode.

title: Ijiwaru Baa-san
synopsis: Based on a 1966 manga by Sazae-san creator Hasegawa Machiko. This is another slice-of-everyday-life tale, centered around a spiteful old woman who causes trouble for neighbours with her constant bumbling and grumbling. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Toradora!: Ami no Monomane 150 Renpatsu!!
titleNative: とらどら！亜美モノマネ１５０連発！！
synopsis: Scene left out of episode 6 of the main series, later released as a bonus on the Toradora PSP Super Premium DVD Box.

title: YanYan Machiko
synopsis: A comedy anime about the life of Machiko, a sheep girl who lives in the Champs-Élysées shopping district.

title: Nameko: Sekai no Tomodachi
titleNative: なめこ～せかいのともだち～
synopsis: Nameko forest is where different kinds of Nameko from all over the world gather. Nameko and his friends, who live in the forest, decide to tell people about the forest's charm by becoming guides, forming the group "Universal Rangers of Nameko Forest." The Nameko that come from all over the world are all unique, with their own personalities. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Onnanoko tte.
synopsis: The original manga is about the many worries that girls have, such as pimples, dry skin, unwanted hair, drinking while driving, face turning red, and singing well at karaoke. The series explains matters regarding girls' bodies and minds through manga art and answers from experts. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Teiko Penguin
synopsis: Centers on a penguin who works in an abusive company and gripes about the difficulties of workplace life. The title is a play on the "koutei penguin," the Japanese name for the emperor penguin. (Source: Anime News Network) Note: Part of TV Tokyo's Kinder TV program.

title: NoriPro Anime
synopsis: Unveiling NoriPro's VTuber 3D animation NoriPro Anime! Animation, voice acting, and scenario are all completely created from scratch! (Source: Tsukudani Norio via Twitter, translated)

title: Oyaji no, Imo no Kamisama.
synopsis: A man wanders into a liquor store and sees a familiar shouchuu glass. Memories of his childhood home, his father, and a certain shouchuu glass his father used to call 'a shrine to the potato god' comes flooding back. Commercial made for Satsuma Shiranami brand sweet potato shouchuu.
